shopitems.effectDesc: ATK +15%/+25%
DEF +20%/+35%
Destroyed when equipped and grants 1/2 Funds
Destroyed when equipped and grants +3/+6 stacks to the Operator's own Alliance(s) (Alliance(s) does not need to be active)
Loses 60 HP per second, +40%/+60% ATK
-30%/-50% Redeployment Time, -30% HP
Destroyed when equipped and obtain 1/2 Operator(s) in the Dispatch Center (that Operator is removed from the Dispatch Center)
+20%/+35% ATK; If equipped by a Ground Operator, their attacks have 10% chance of inflicting Frighten for 2 seconds
SP recovery rate +0.15/second/+0.25/second
Destroyed when equipped and gain 1/2 additional Fund(s) at the start of each round.
Destroyed when equipped and obtain 1/2 random Operator(s) from the same Alliance
Destroyed when equipped and gain 2/4 additional Fund(s) at the start of next round.
+15/+25 ATKSPD, +10/+15 to allies on the left and right of this Operator's direction
Attacks on targets 3 or more tiles away deal 30%/50% more damage
Attacks ignore 25%/45% RES
Gains +5%/+8% ATK on skill activation (stacks up to 10 times)
On Deployment, +3/+6 SP; for every Operator in the same Alliance, +3/+6 more SP
+25%/+45% HP; if there is no Operator in the tile ahead on deployment, +15%/+25% more HP
ATK +40%/+60%, ASPD -10
RES +20/+35, attacks Silence the target for 5 seconds
+25%/+45% ATK; Upon taking lethal damage for the first time only, HP will not go below 1, lasting for 15 seconds
ATK +25%/+45%, ASPD +30
For 8/12 seconds after every deployment, attacks inflict 2 seconds of Stun
Destroyed when equipped and grants 1~6/2~12 Funds

Destroyed when equipped and immediately refreshes shop once, offering 3 Operators from the same Alliance as the Operator equipped with it, and you may obtain 1 of them for free (Operator's tier will not exceed Dispatch Center level)
More likely to be attacked, +40%/+60% HP
Every attack or heal gives ASPD +1/+2 for this battle, up to 60 stacks
When taking damage for the first time, gain Camouflage for 15/25 seconds
When blocking enemies, takes 40%/70% less damage from enemies not blocked by this unit
For every target hit by an attack, recovers 2%/4% Max HP
When deployed, increase damage dealt to 135%/160%, decaying over 15 seconds
When ammo-type skills have 1 bullet left for the first time, there is 50%/60% chance of recovering 40%/60% ammo
+30%/+50% ATK; When dealing Arts damage, deals an additional 10% as Burn
When HP is greater than 70%/40%, Operator is immune to Stun, Frozen, and other special statuses
Heals have 10%/15% chance to grant 1 stack of Shield to the target (Max 1 stack)
When defeated in battle, immediately revive (once/twice per battle)
Attacks have 3%/5% chance to inflict 1 stack of Paralysis on target
Attacks have 12%/20% chance of inflicting Cold on the target for 1.5s
+30%/+50% ATK, and when dealing Physical or Arts damage, damage type turns into Weakness damage

Destroys itself along with the Operator when equipped; a special refresh occurs, offering two Operators of the same tier as the equipped Operator.
Automatically chooses a Teammate with the most members in the corresponding Alliance, and dispatches a same-quality copy of the equipped Operator to the Teammate during the next Rest Phase.
If two or more teammates have the same highest number of Operators from that Alliance, the receipient is chosen at random.
Cannot be equipped by Custom Operators
Destroyed when equipped, and if you have at least two of this non-Elite Operator, obtain a third copy; otherwise obtain 1 random non-Elite Operator from the same Alliance
Equippable by any Operator; this is destroyed at the start of the next round, and the Operator is promoted to an Elite Operator
For every 8/7 Operators sold, obtain a (non-Elite) Operator from the same Alliance of the Operator with this equipped (their tier will not exceed Dispatch Center level)
After the battle ends, equipped Operator changes to a random Operator 1 Tier higher
+50%/+75% HP, if the bearer has "Silverlance Pegasus' Spear", recovers 8% Max HP per second
+40%/+60% ATK, attacks deal an additional 30% damage as True damage

+40%/+60% ATK; If equipped by a [Laterano] Operator, the Operator gains a 35% chance to fire an extra bullet at an enemy within Attack Range, dealing 150% ATK as Physical damage If 'Lateran Clip' is also equipped by the [Laterano] Operator, bullet deals 300% ATK instead

+45%/+70% HP; If equipped by a [Yan] Operator, gain +25 ASPD for every Operator obtained this round before battle begins (Max 3 stacks) If 'Yanese Dagger' is also equipped by the [Yan] Operator, +2 Funds whenever you obtain an Operator (Max 3 times per round)

Damage taken -180/-300; If equipped by an [Ægir] Operator, when taking damage, deal 50% of ATK as Arts damage to the attacker (once every 0.5 second) If 'Ægirian Blade' is also equipped by the [Ægir] Operator, trigger the aforementioned effect an additional time

+35/+55 ASPD; If equipped by a [Victoria] Operator, the Operator gains effects of all Victorian Hammers on the field (excluding ATK buffs) If any 'Victorian Hammer' is also equipped by the [Victoria] Operator, effects of this 'Victorian Hammer' are doubled

+30/+50 RES; If equipped by a [Kjerag] Operator, enemies inflicted with Cold or Frozen in range is dealt 30% of ATK as Arts Damage per second If 'Kjeragi Nevermeltice' is also equipped by the [Kjerag] Operator, damage dealt increases to 100% ATK

+30/+40 Starting SP; If equipped by a [Sargon] Operator, the Operator recovers 30 SP when skill ends for the first time If 'Sargonian Teaspresso' is also equipped by the [Sargon] Operator, every skill activation grants 3 SP to all [Sargon] Operators
Destroyed when equipped and increases Deployment Limit to 9

Equipped Operator gains an extra Alliance (based on the other Equipment)
Details can be checked in Equipment's Talent tab during simulations (check the end of the page)

-40%/-60% ATKSPD; If equipped by a [Kazimierz] Operator, for 20 seconds after skill activation, reduce the ATKSPD and MSPD of enemies in range by 35% If the [Kazimierz] Operator is also equipped with "Kazimierz Stadium Flag", they gain +100% ATK while skill is active, and will not retreat when taking lethal damage. Retreats after skill ends.

Natural SP recovery +0.2/+0.35 SP/second; If equipped by a [Siracusa] Operator, their ATK gradually increases to 200% while in Camauflage, lasting until dealing damage for the first time after Camauflage ends or the Operator leaves the field If the [Siracusa] Operator is also equipped with "Siracusan Formal Attire" they deal an additional 800% of ATK as True damage when damaging enemies for the first time after losing Camauflage.
Drag onto field to use; obtains Operator in range (Includes Elite Operators and equipment!)
Drag onto field to use and select a bounty to challenge
